hero.title: Premium Natural Stones from India to the Kingdom
hero.subtitle: Slate, Marble & Granite — sourced from India's finest quarries, delivered across Saudi Arabia

intro.title: Bridging India's Quarries with Saudi Arabia's Vision
intro.body: We source the finest natural stones directly from India's legendary quarries and deliver them to the most ambitious projects across the Kingdom. From heritage villas in Riyadh to luxury hotels in Jeddah — every stone is inspected, certified, and delivered with care.

products.subtitle: Three world-class categories, sourced directly from India's richest quarries

why_us.title: Why Choose Himalayan Gulf Stones
why_us.subtitle: The trusted bridge between India's finest quarries and Saudi Arabia's most ambitious projects
why_us.direct_import_desc: We source directly from the best quarries across India, eliminating middlemen and ensuring authenticity
why_us.saudi_delivery_desc: We deliver to every city and region across the Kingdom — Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Makkah, Madinah and beyond
why_us.custom_cutting_desc: Stones precision-cut to your exact project specifications at our processing facilities
why_us.quality_desc: Every stone inspected and certified before shipping — guaranteed authenticity and consistency

sourcing.title: From Quarry to Kingdom
sourcing.subtitle: A seamless supply chain — from India's mountainous quarries to your Saudi project site
sourcing.step1_desc: We partner with the finest quarries across Rajasthan, Andhra Pradesh, and Himachal Pradesh
sourcing.step2_desc: Every batch is manually inspected for color consistency, structural integrity, and finish quality
sourcing.step3_desc: Stones are cut, calibrated, and finished to your exact specifications at our processing facilities
sourcing.step4_desc: Containerized shipping from Indian ports to Jeddah Islamic Port and Dammam Port
sourcing.step5_desc: Door-to-site delivery across all regions of the Kingdom

about.title: About Himalayan Gulf Stones
about.subtitle: Your exclusive gateway to India's finest natural stones in Saudi Arabia
about.story_body: Himalayan Gulf Stones was founded with a single vision: to bring the timeless beauty of India's natural stones to Saudi Arabia's most ambitious architectural projects. We saw a gap between the extraordinary quality of Indian stone and what was available in the Saudi market — and we built a bridge.
about.mission_body: To deliver the finest Indian natural stones — Slate, Marble, and Granite — to every corner of the Kingdom, with uncompromising quality, authenticity, and service.
about.vision_body: To be Saudi Arabia's most trusted and recognized natural stone partner, known for quality, reliability, and deep industry expertise.
about.distributor_title: Exclusive Distributor — The Himalayan Ventures LLC
about.distributor_body: We are proud to be the exclusive authorized distributor of The Himalayan Ventures LLC in Saudi Arabia. This partnership gives our customers direct access to the highest-quality, authentically sourced stones from one of India's most respected stone companies — with guaranteed provenance, competitive pricing, and priority supply.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end natural stone solutions for Saudi Arabia's construction and design industry
services.import_desc: We handle the entire supply chain from Indian quarries to your Saudi project site — customs, logistics, and delivery included
services.cutting_desc: Stones cut to your exact specifications at our processing facilities — any size, any shape, any thickness
services.finishing_desc: Polished, honed, flamed, brushed, sandblasted, natural cleft, and leathered finishes available
services.delivery_desc: Delivery to all cities and regions across the Kingdom — Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Makkah, Madinah, and beyond
services.consultation_desc: Expert stone selection advice based on your project requirements, climate considerations, and design vision
services.wholesale_desc: Competitive pricing for contractors, developers, and large-scale projects with flexible payment terms
services.samples_desc: Request stone samples delivered to your location before committing to a full order

announcement.text: New shipment of Black Galaxy Granite arriving this month — Reserve yours now!

slate.page_desc: Premium Indian natural slate stone — ideal for flooring, wall cladding, roofing, landscaping, and exterior paving. Known for its durability, natural texture, and weather resistance — perfect for Saudi Arabia's climate.

marble.page_desc: Exquisite Indian marble from the legendary quarries of Rajasthan — renowned for purity, elegance, and lasting beauty. Ideal for luxury flooring, countertops, bathrooms, and statement walls.

granite.page_desc: World-class Indian granite — renowned for exceptional hardness, beauty, and versatility. The material of choice for high-traffic flooring, kitchen countertops, building facades, and monumental projects.
